_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain the enterprise data and AI strategy, including vision articulation, strategic priority identification, capability roadmap construction, and annual strategy refresh.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. Task LS-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-003 (LS, cosine: 0.543), LS-A-005 (LS, cosine: 0.535).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.504). Shared vocabulary: [maintain, strategic]. NICE-only terms [plans] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, annual, articulation, capability, construction, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.888, R=0.843). P exceeds R by 0.045 — the NICE element's 3 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Maintain strategic plans" and "Develop and maintain the enterprise data and AI strategy, including vision artic" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.593 > STS 0.504 (gap +0.089). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [maintain, strategic] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [maintain, strategic]. NICE-only: [plans]. WIDAI-only: [ai, annual, articulation, capability, construction, data].
